Focus Sash.desc: Held: Holder survives any single-hit attack at 1 HP if at max HP, then the item is consumed.

Sitrus Berry.desc: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to recover 1/4 max HP.

Choice Scarf.desc: Held: Increases Speed by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

Chople Berry.desc: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Fighting-type attack to halve the damage.
